query:
You are a SaaS pricing analyst. For each of the 10 companies below, extract their CURRENT pricing structure from their public pricing pages ({domain}/pricing, {domain}/plans), G2, Capterra, and reverse-engineering posts.

Companies:
  1. name="Coval", website="https://coval.ai"
  2. name="SiliconFlow", website="https://siliconflow.com"
  3. name="Together AI", website="https://together.ai"
  4. name="Workato", website="https://orkato.com"
  5. name="Northflank", website="https://northflank.com"
  6. name="Botpress", website="https://botpress.com"
  7. name="Hugging Face", website="https://huggingface.co"
  8. name="Altair AI Studio", website="https://altair.com"
  9. name="Fermyon", website="https://fermyon.com"
  10. name="AWS Bedrock", website="https://aws.amazon.com"

For EACH company extract:
- pricing_model_kind: one of Freemium, Subscription, Usage-based, Enterprise, Hybrid
- free_plan: true/false
- starts_at_usd: lowest paid tier monthly USD (0 if free plan only, null if Enterprise-only / contact sales)
- mention: short UI tagline e.g. 'Starts at $20/user/mo' or 'Contact sales' or 'Free + paid plans from $8/mo'
- tiers: array of {name, price_monthly_usd, price_annual_usd, features (3-6 strings), target}. Include ALL public tiers (e.g. Free, Pro, Business, Enterprise). For Enterprise tiers without public price, set price_monthly_usd=null and target='Enterprise'.
- recent_changes: any pricing change in last 12 months (date + source). Leave blank if none.

Omit any field you cannot verify — do NOT invent prices. Return one object per company in the SAME order as the input list. Preserve company names EXACTLY.
answer:
# SaaS Pricing Structure Analysis

## 1. Executive Summary
This report details the current pricing structures, tier breakdowns, and recent pricing changes for the requested SaaS companies as of June 2026. Comprehensive usage-based, subscription, and hybrid pricing models were identified for Coval, SiliconFlow, Together AI, and Workato [Pricing | Coval](https://coval.ai/pricing) [Pricing Plans - SiliconFlow | Transparent Pay-as-You-Go](https://www.siliconflow.com/pricing) [Pricing | Together AI](https://together.ai/pricing) [Pricing | Workato docs](https://docs.workato.com/pricing.html). No verifiable pricing data was present in the provided findings for the remaining six companies.

## 2. Detailed Analysis

### 1. Coval
- **name**: "Coval"
- **pricing_model_kind**: "Subscription" [Pricing | Coval](https://coval.ai/pricing)
- **free_plan**: false [Pricing | Coval](https://coval.ai/pricing)
- **starts_at_usd**: 30 [Coval vs Cekura: Voice AI Testing Compared (2026) — Coval](https://www.coval.ai/blog/coval-vs-cekura)
- **mention**: "Starts at $30/mo for Developer or $100/mo for Starter" [Pricing | Coval](https://coval.ai/pricing) [Coval vs Cekura: Voice AI Testing Compared (2026) — Coval](https://www.coval.ai/blog/coval-vs-cekura)
- **tiers**:
  - `{ name: "Developer", price_monthly_usd: 30, price_annual_usd: null, features: ["~150 mins voice testing", "Self-serve access", "SOC 2 Type II, HIPAA, GDPR"], target: "Developers" }` [Coval vs Cekura: Voice AI Testing Compared (2026) — Coval](https://www.coval.ai/blog/coval-vs-cekura) [Pricing | Coval](https://coval.ai/pricing)
  - `{ name: "Starter", price_monthly_usd: 100, price_annual_usd: 960, features: ["100 simulation minutes", "1,000 monitored calls", "1 project, 5 concurrent simulations", "30 days trace retention", "SOC 2 Type II, HIPAA, GDPR"], target: "Small teams" }` [Pricing | Coval](https://coval.ai/pricing)
  - `{ name: "Growth", price_monthly_usd: 500, price_annual_usd: 4800, features: ["1,000 simulation minutes", "10,000 monitored calls", "5 projects, 25 concurrent simulations", "90 days trace retention", "SOC 2 Type II, HIPAA, GDPR"], target: "Growing teams" }` [Pricing | Coval](https://coval.ai/pricing)
  - `{ name: "Enterprise", price_monthly_usd: 4500, price_annual_usd: null, features: ["Custom trace retention", "High-volume processing", "Multi-team organization support", "SOC 2 Type II, HIPAA, GDPR"], target: "Enterprise" }` [Pricing | Coval](https://coval.ai/pricing)
- **recent_changes**: "In 2026, a $30/month Developer plan was mentioned in a company blog post. Third-party sources also report older/alternative pricing of $300 (Core) and $999 (Scale) [Coval vs Cekura: Voice AI Testing Compared (2026) — Coval](https://www.coval.ai/blog/coval-vs-cekura) [Coval Pricing: Cost and Pricing plans](https://www.saasworthy.com/product/coval-software/pricing)."

### 2. SiliconFlow
- **name**: "SiliconFlow"
- **pricing_model_kind**: "Usage-based" [Pricing Plans - SiliconFlow | Transparent Pay-as-You-Go](https://www.siliconflow.com/pricing)
- **free_plan**: true [SiliconFlow: Details, Reviews, Pricing, & Features | CheckThat.ai](https://checkthat.ai/brands/siliconflow)
- **starts_at_usd**: 0 [Pricing Plans - SiliconFlow | Transparent Pay-as-You-Go](https://www.siliconflow.com/pricing)
- **mention**: "Transparent Pay-as-You-Go" [Pricing Plans - SiliconFlow | Transparent Pay-as-You-Go](https://www.siliconflow.com/pricing)
- **tiers**:
  - `{ name: "Serverless", price_monthly_usd: 0, price_annual_usd: 0, features: ["Pay-as-you-go API usage", "$1 free credits for new users", "Monthly spending limits", "Access to DeepSeek, Qwen, FLUX"], target: "General users" }` [Pricing Plans - SiliconFlow | Transparent Pay-as-You-Go](https://www.siliconflow.com/pricing) [SiliconFlow: Details, Reviews, Pricing, & Features | CheckThat.ai](https://checkthat.ai/brands/siliconflow)
  - `{ name: "Reserved GPU Instances", price_monthly_usd: null, price_annual_usd: null, features: ["Hourly-rate dedicated compute", "Volume discounts available"], target: "High-usage customers" }` [SiliconFlow: Details, Reviews, Pricing, & Features | CheckThat.ai](https://checkthat.ai/brands/siliconflow) [Pricing Plans - SiliconFlow | Transparent Pay-as-You-Go](https://www.siliconflow.com/pricing)
  - `{ name: "Enterprise / Private Deployment", price_monthly_usd: null, price_annual_usd: null, features: ["Custom pricing", "Private deployment", "Volume discounts"], target: "Enterprise" }` [SiliconFlow: Details, Reviews, Pricing, & Features | CheckThat.ai](https://checkthat.ai/brands/siliconflow) [Pricing Plans - SiliconFlow | Transparent Pay-as-You-Go](https://www.siliconflow.com/pricing)
- **recent_changes**: "On November 23, 2025, SiliconFlow removed the 'free' filter option from its model list. Rate limits (RPH and RPD) were removed for DeepSeek-R1 and V3. Several models were scheduled for discontinuation in early 2026 [Release notes - SiliconFlow](https://docs.siliconflow.cn/en/release-notes/overview) [Free and Paid AI API Selection Guide • Usubeni Fantasy](https://ssshooter.com/en/ai-services-guide/)."

  - `{ name: "Build Tier 2+", price_monthly_usd: 0, price_annual_usd: 0, features: ["Requires $5 minimum spend", "Access to premium models (Flux Pro)", "Dedicated endpoints access"], target: "Active developers" }` [Together AI Free Tier 2026 — Free Models, Credits & Limits | Price Per Token](https://pricepertoken.com/endpoints/together/free)
  - `{ name: "Dedicated Inference / GPU Clusters", price_monthly_usd: null, price_annual_usd: null, features: ["Custom hardware (H100, B200)", "Hourly pricing ($5.49-$11.95/hr)", "Reserved capacity discounts"], target: "Scaling applications" }` [Pricing | Together AI](https://together.ai/pricing)
- **recent_changes**: "In March 2026, launched a real-time voice agent platform. Introduced DeepSeek V3.1 at $0.60/1M input and $1.70/1M output, replacing legacy V3 ($1.25 flat) [Together AI revenue, valuation & funding | Sacra](https://sacra.com/c/together-ai/) [Together.ai API Pricing 2026 — All Models, Live Rates | AI Pricing Guru](https://www.aipricing.guru/together-pricing/)."

### 4. Workato
- **name**: "Workato"
- **pricing_model_kind**: "Usage-based" [Pricing | Workato docs](https://docs.workato.com/pricing.html)

- **mention**: "Consumption-based pricing starting around $10,000/year" [Workato Pricing 2026: 4 Plans from $833–$15,000/month](https://costbench.com/software/ai-automation/workato)
- **tiers**:
  - `{ name: "Standard", price_monthly_usd: 833, price_annual_usd: 10000, features: ["Unlimited connections", "Unlimited workflows (recipes)", "Unlimited collaborators", "Consumption-based tasks"], target: "SMBs" }` [Workato Pricing 2026: 4 Plans from $833–$15,000/month](https://costbench.com/software/ai-automation/workato)
  - `{ name: "Business", price_monthly_usd: null, price_annual_usd: null, features: ["5 million tasks", "Unlimited connections", "Unlimited workflows", "Unlimited collaborators"], target: "Mid-market" }` [Workato Pricing 2026: 4 Plans from $833–$15,000/month](https://costbench.com/software/ai-automation/workato)
  - `{ name: "Enterprise", price_monthly_usd: null, price_annual_usd: null, features: ["High volume tasks", "Unlimited connections", "Unlimited workflows", "Unlimited collaborators"], target: "Enterprise" }` [Workato Pricing 2026: 4 Plans from $833–$15,000/month](https://costbench.com/software/ai-automation/workato)
  - `{ name: "Workato One", price_monthly_usd: null, price_annual_usd: null, features: ["Agentic Orchestration", "AI-powered adaptive automations", "Unlimited connections", "Unlimited workflows"], target: "Advanced Enterprise" }` [Workato Pricing 2026: Plans & How Much It Really Costs · Activepieces](https://www.activepieces.com/blog/workato-pricing) [Workato Pricing 2026: 4 Plans from $833–$15,000/month](https://costbench.com/software/ai-automation/workato)
- **recent_changes**: "Effective July 2024, Workato shifted its pricing model from unlimited-action recipes to a consumption-based model based on triggers or actions (tasks) [Workato Pricing 2026: 4 Plans from $833–$15,000/month](https://costbench.com/software/ai-automation/workato)."
